title: Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble
tagline: Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kanipura Sri Gopalakrishna Temple at Kumbla is an ancient temple situated eight miles due north of the town of Kasaragod in Kerala in South India.
overview.description: Kanipura Sri Gopalakrishna Temple at Kumbla is an ancient temple situated eight miles due north of the town of Kasaragod in Kerala in South India. This shrine is eulogised as among the extant Abhimana Kshethrams in Vaishnavite tradition. The Krishnashila Idol of the Lord Bala Gopalkrishna had the features of a child and was worshipped by Lord Krishna's foster mother Yashoda. According to local religious beliefs, this idol was presented by the almighty Lord Krishna himself to the sage Maharshi in Dvapara Yuga, who in turn the idol at its present location where the temple still stands today.

topPlaces.name: Kumbla
topPlaces.description: Kumbla is a small town in the Kasaragod district of Kerala state in India. It is located 12 km north of Kasaragod town.

topPlaces.name: Koipady
topPlaces.description: Koipady is a census town in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. Koipady is a part of Kumbla Grama Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Arikady Fort
topPlaces.description: Arikadi Fort is a fort located in the Kasaragod district of Kerala, India. It is also known as Kumbla Fort.

topPlaces.name: Arikady
topPlaces.description: Arikady is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. Team Whyos, a popular gang in India and UAE belongs to Arikady.

topPlaces.name: Shiriya
topPlaces.description: Shiriya is a village in the Kasaragod district of Kerala, India. It comprises several smaller localities, namely Shiriya, Shiriya Kunnil, Muttam Gate, and Olayam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Gopalakrishna Temple Kumble?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kumbla, Koipady, Arikady Fort, Arikady, Shiriya.
